name: Impact of Refusing Hearing Protection on Claims

mainEntity.name: Is hearing loss from power tools compensable if I refused earplugs in Millcreek?
mainEntity.text: Is hearing loss from power tools compensable if I refused earplugs in Millcreek?

acceptedAnswer.text: Possibly reduced; Utah courts apply comparative negligence, apportioning benefits based on worker fault like refusing provided protection, per general comp principles.

suggestedAnswer.text: Refusal documented by employer reduces awards proportionally (e.g., 20% fault = 20% cut). But if protection inadequate or training deficient, full claim viable. Millcreek construction cases hinge on records; challenge 'refusal' narratives with witnesses. Attorneys negotiate better outcomes.[6]

description: Possibly reduced; Utah courts apply comparative negligence, apportioning benefits based on worker fault like refusing provided protection, per general comp prin
